acceptance_criteria:
1. PromptValueInner with OnceLock<UnionResolution>
2. resolved_ty() computes once via OnceLock
3. is_union_resolved() check
4. Ambiguous unions return original union type
5. Deterministic - same value always resolves same way
6. Unit tests for union scenarios
7. cargo test passes

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
This bead implements resolved_ty() which is used by:
- dsrs-n9u.19 (get_value): Needed to determine if union is resolved before allowing field access
- dsrs-n9u.27 (structural fallback): Renders resolved type vs 'one of: A | B' for ambiguous

title: Implement PromptValue union resolution with memoization

acceptance_criteria: cargo check/test/clippy green; new handoff in thoughts/shared/handoffs/general; jj describe.
